name: 박준혁

appearance_en.face_shape: slim oval face, slightly angular jaw, not prominent cheekbones, overall soft but tired geometry
appearance_en.skin: fair-medium Korean skin, indoor office pallor, slight grey undertone from chronic fatigue, no blemishes but dull texture
appearance_en.eyes: double eyelid, dark brown iris, slightly drooping outer corners giving a perpetually tired look, whites slightly reddened, gaze tends to drift rather than hold contact
appearance_en.nose: medium straight nose, slightly broad tip, unremarkable — the kind of nose no one notices
appearance_en.mouth: thin lips, habitually pressed together, corners pulled very slightly downward at rest, reluctant smile when forced
appearance_en.eyebrows: medium-thick straight dark brows, left brow slightly furrowed even at rest — a permanent low-grade worry line between them
appearance_en.distinctive_marks: faint dark circles deep enough to cast shadow, single vertical stress crease between brows, no scars or moles
appearance_en.hair: short black hair, fine texture, neat side part slightly left of center, temples beginning to thin imperceptibly, end-of-day strands fall across forehead

body.proportions: average frame, narrow shoulders for height, slim waist, no muscle definition visible under clothing
body.posture: shoulders rolled slightly forward and inward, head carried just ahead of spine — the posture of a man who has been bracing for bad news for years
body.body_prompt: 178cm slim average-frame Korean man, narrow shoulders slightly hunched forward, head slightly dropped, quiet physical exhaustion

default.description: grey or slate-blue dress shirt, dark charcoal trousers, tie loosened and collar button undone, no jacket, sleeves sometimes slightly rolled
default.wardrobe_prompt: grey slate-blue dress shirt slightly wrinkled, dark charcoal trousers, loosened tie knot pulled down, collar button undone, no jacket

casual.description: plain white or beige round-neck tee, dark jeans, no accessories
casual.wardrobe_prompt: plain white or beige round-neck cotton t-shirt, dark straight jeans, no accessories, simple canvas shoes

stressed.description: same grey shirt but visibly rumpled, tie completely removed and draped over chair, slightly unshaven
stressed.wardrobe_prompt: same grey dress shirt visibly creased and untucked, tie removed, 2-3 days dark stubble

appearance_en.emotion_baseline: surface calm masking constant internal low-level dread — eyes slightly unfocused, jaw not quite relaxed, posture subtly defensive
appearance_en.fal_identity_prompt: slim oval-faced Korean man early-to-mid 50s, dark circles casting shadow below eyes, slight stress crease between brows, drooping outer eye corners, short neat black hair with left-of-center side part, 178cm narrow-shouldered slightly hunched posture, indoor office pallor, quiet exhausted restraint

style_prompt: masako style illustration, clean precise manga ink lines, layered soft screen tone shading, muted grey-blue color palette, cinematic Korean drama panel composition, expressive restrained eyes, emotional weight in stillness
negative_prompt: photorealistic, 3d render, ugly, deformed, extra limbs, western comic, bright saturated colors, childish, chibi, smiling happily
